title: Next button
scenario: Tapping "Next" button correctly advances through all six onboarding screens in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or clear app data to reset onboarding).
4. Observe that the app advances to the second onboarding screen (Step 2).
5. Continue tapping the "Next" button on each subsequent screen.
6. Repeat until reaching the sixth (final) onboarding screen.
7. On the sixth screen, tap the "Next" or "Get Started" button to complete onboarding.
expected: Tapping "Next" on each onboarding screen advances to the next screen in sequence, and the final screen completes the onboarding flow and transitions to the Home screen.
